description:
On VBAT application, the BMS shall:
  · Initialise all subsystems
  · Perform memory self-check
  · Load calibration parameters from NVM
  · Verify sensor communication
Upon successful initialisation: BMS_SystemState := Standby

IF  unrecoverable internal fault detected
THEN
  · Transition to SafeState
  · Open all contactors
  · BMS_Fault_Latch := 1
  · Broadcast fault status on CAN

IF  BMS_InsulationFault_Flag = 1 for >= 1 s
THEN
  · BMS_InsulationFault_Latch := 1
  · Store DTC in non-volatile memory
  · HV contactor closure disabled until diagnostic clear

IF  any degradation indicator exceeds its threshold
THEN
  · BMS_CellDegrade_Warn := 1
  · Update SOH prediction model

Upon VCU_HVConnect_Req = 1 with all preconditions satisfied:
  · Close negative main contactor
  · Enable precharge circuit
  · BMS_SystemState := PrechargeActive

Upon BMS_ChargeComplete_Flag = 1:
  · BMS_ChargeTerm_Req := 1
  · Command charge contactor Open
  · Store charge event record (final SOC, energy, duration)

IF  calculated SOH <= 80 %
THEN
  · BMS_BatteryDegrade_Warn := 1
  · Store DTC P0A0F in non-volatile memory

IF  SOC <= 10 %
THEN
  · BMS_LowSOC_Flag := 1
  · Limit discharge power to 25 % of MaxDischargePower
  · Broadcast low SOC warning on CAN

During active balancing:
  · Selected cells shall be discharged through balancing resistor
  · Balancing shall continue until delta < 20 mV or timeout reached
  · Balancing shall be suspended when pack current > 5 A

IF  DC bus voltage >= 90 % of pack voltage within precharge timeout
THEN
  · Close positive main contactor
  · Disable precharge circuit
  · BMS_SystemState := HV_Active
ELSE
  · Abort HV activation
  · BMS_SystemState := HV_Failure
  · BMS_PrechargeFault_Flag := 1

IF  BMS_HVILFault_Flag = 1
THEN
  · Open all main contactors within 100 ms
  · BMS_SystemState := SafeState

IF  pack charge current exceeds 150 A
THEN
  · BMS_ChargeOC_Flag := 1
  · Limit charge current to 100 A within 50 ms

IF  BMS_OV_RecoverAllow = 1 AND VCU_HVConnect_Req = 1
THEN
  · Reset BMS_SystemState to normal operation
  · Clear all overvoltage fault flags

Upon VCU_HVDisconnect_Req or critical fault:
  · Open both main contactors
  · Discharge DC link capacitance
  · BMS_SystemState := HV_Deactivating
  · THEN Standby or SafeState as appropriate

IF  cumulative charge throughput exceeds design cycle limit
THEN
  · BMS_SOHEstFault_Flag := 1
  · Trigger SOH re-calibration request

IF  CAN bus-off or excessive error passive detected
THEN
  · BMS_CANFault_Flag := 1
  · Enter limp-home mode (discharge power <= 30 %)
  · BMS_SafeState_Entry := 1

IF  insulation monitoring device reports internal fault
THEN
  · BMS_InsulationSensorFault_Flag := 1
  · Continue monitoring via redundant measurement path if available

IF  total pack voltage < minimum operating threshold
THEN
  · BMS_PackUV_Flag := 1
  · Send DTC P0A01 to VCU
  · Limit discharge power proportionally to undervoltage severity

While BMS_ChargeTerm_Req = 1:
  · Charge contactor closure shall be inhibited
  · BMS_ChargeReady_Flag := 0
  · Charge termination status shall be broadcast on CAN

While BMS_Fault_Latch = 1:
  · All contactor closure prohibited
  · Normal operation blocked until power cycle
  · Fault code readable via diagnostic interface
